text:
WORLDVIEWS ASSIGNMENT QUESTIONS 

INSTRUCTIONS: 
I) 
Attempt all questions 
II) 
Each question carries 25 Marks 
III) Submission is by hard copy. 
IV) Deadline for submission: 30th February 2026 

Questions 
1. a) Compose an essay presentation discussing the relevance 
of understanding worldviews to your professional career. Use 
specific examples from your professional code of conduct. 
(12 Marks) 
b) Using examples, discuss various practical ways existing 
worldviews have influenced your own ethnic cultural 
practices. (13marks) 

2. a) Discuss ways through which the Christian Worldview 
challanges naturalistic worldview on the question of human 
evolution? (12 Marks) 
b) Justify how the Christian worldview about the value of 
human life provides exceptional perspectives for treating 
clients in your professional practice. (13marks)
